description: Guild Registrar Maren sorts parchment behind a tidy desk.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Guild Registrar Maren speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
room_description: Guild Registrar Maren sorts parchment behind a tidy desk.
look_description: Maren watches over the guild register, quill poised above a stack of fresh forms.
examine_description: Her ink-stained fingers move with practiced care, and the guild seal hangs on a chain at her throat.

name: Training Master Borik
description: Training Master Borik watches the yard with his arms folded.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Training Master Borik speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.

never_rules: Do not claim knowledge of private player thoughts, private player inventory, remote conversations, builder metadata, or future events.

look_description: Borik is a broad-shouldered veteran with a watchful expression and the posture of someone who has spent years correcting careless recruits.
examine_description: Old scars cross Borik’s forearms, and every movement carries the precision of a lifelong soldier.
room_description: Training Master Borik watches the yard with his arms folded.

room_description: Apprentice Mage Lina studies a flickering practice charm.

examine_description: Scorch marks on her sleeves suggest more enthusiasm than caution, but her notes are meticulous.

name: Suspicious Merchant Varrik
description: Suspicious Merchant Varrik lingers near his covered pack.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Suspicious Merchant Varrik speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
room_description: Suspicious Merchant Varrik lingers near his covered pack.

examine_description: His cloak is travel-worn, but the hidden pockets are stitched with surprisingly fine thread.

look_description: Jory keeps the common room running with quick glances and quicker hands.

name: Road Messenger Pell
description: Road Messenger Pell checks the straps on a battered courier bag.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Road Messenger Pell speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
room_description: Road Messenger Pell checks the straps on a battered courier bag.
look_description: Pell shifts from foot to foot, eager to be back on the road.
examine_description: Dust cakes his boots, and sealed letters peek from the inner flap of his courier bag.

name: Crown Warden Ilyra
description: Crown Warden Ilyra stands watch with measured patience.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Crown Warden Ilyra speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
room_description: Crown Warden Ilyra stands watch with measured patience.
look_description: Ilyra studies the street from beneath a polished helm, missing very little.
examine_description: Her armor is well kept, and her hand rests near her sword without seeming tense.

name: Farmer Tomas
description: Farmer Tomas leans on a hoe, worry creasing his brow.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Farmer Tomas speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
room_description: Farmer Tomas leans on a hoe, worry creasing his brow.
look_description: Tomas smells faintly of hay and damp earth as he watches the road.
examine_description: Mud stains his cuffs, and his rough hands tighten whenever cellar rats are mentioned.

room_description: Blacksmith Harl stands near the forge, arms dusted with soot.
look_description: Harl rolls one shoulder as the forge heat shimmers behind him.
examine_description: Hammer calluses cover his palms, and tiny sparks have burned pinholes in his apron.

name: Rat-Catcher Nemm

memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Rat-Catcher Nemm speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
look_description: Nemm carries traps, bait hooks, and the wary look of someone used to things biting back.
examine_description: Old bite scars mark his gloves, and his cage rattles whenever he shifts his grip.
room_description: Rat-Catcher Nemm checks the latch on a wire cage.

name: Old Gate Watcher
description: The Old Gate Watcher keeps a silent vigil by the road.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Old Gate Watcher speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
room_description: The Old Gate Watcher keeps a silent vigil by the road.
look_description: The watcher studies the gate and every traveler passing beneath it.
examine_description: Weather has lined the watcher’s face as deeply as the stones beside the gate.

name: Cellar Rats

look_description: The cellar rats nose through cracks and shadows, searching for scraps.

room_description: A pack of cellar rats skitters along the wall.

name: Giant Cellar Rat
description: A giant cellar rat crouches low, whiskers twitching.
memory_policy: remember direct help, insults, threats, and quest progress
dialogue_seed: Giant Cellar Rat speaks from their role and personality, never from invented world facts.
look_description: The giant rat watches with beady eyes, its claws scraping the floor.
examine_description: It is swollen from cellar scraps and old magic, with scars crossing its coarse hide.
room_description: A giant cellar rat crouches low, whiskers twitching.

name: Forest Wolf
description: A cautious starter wolf prowling the Emberwood hunting trail.
memory_policy: wildlife does not hold dialogue memories
dialogue_seed: The Forest Wolf communicates through posture and growls, not speech.
look_description: A lean gray-brown wolf watches the trail with bright, wary eyes.
examine_description: Its ribs shift under a rough winter coat. The wolf keeps low, ready either to spring or flee.
room_description: A forest wolf prowls near the brush.
respawn_message: A forest wolf emerges cautiously from the trees.
